mapper.sql: WITH login_agg AS ( SELECT u.id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS login_count, MAX(u.last_login_time) AS last_active_time FROM user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.last_login_time IS NOT NULL AND u.last_login_time >= #{startDateTime} AND u.last_login_time < #{endDateTime} GROUP BY u.id ), practice_agg AS ( SELECT pr.user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS practice_record_count, COUNT(pd.id) AS practice_answer_count, MAX(COALESCE(pd.create_time, pr.update_time, pr.create_time)) AS last_active_time FROM practice_record pr LEFT JOIN practice_detail pd ON pd.record_id = pr.id AND pd.create_time >= #{startDateTime} AND pd.create_time < #{endDateTime} WHERE (pr.create_time >= #{startDateTime} AND pr.create_time < #{endDateTime}) OR pd.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pr.user_id ), exam_agg AS ( SELECT er.user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.id) AS exam_record_count, COUNT(ea.id) AS exam_answer_count, MAX( CASE WHEN ea.create_time IS NOT NULL AND ea.create_time > COALESCE(er.end_time, er.create_time) THEN ea.create_time ELSE COALESCE(er.end_time, er.create_time) END ) AS last_active_time FROM exam_record er LEFT JOIN exam_answer ea ON ea.exam_id = er.id AND ea.create_time >= #{startDateTime} AND ea.create_time < #{endDateTime} WHERE (er.create_time >= #{startDateTime} AND er.create_time < #{endDateTime}) OR (er.end_time IS NOT NULL AND er.end_time >= #{startDateTime} AND er.end_time < #{endDateTime}) OR ea.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY er.user_id ), ai_agg AS ( SELECT acl.user_id, COUNT(*) AS ai_call_count, MAX(acl.create_time) AS last_active_time FROM ai_call_log acl WHERE acl.call_type = 'USER' AND acl.user_id IS NOT NULL AND acl.create_time >= #{startDateTime} AND acl.create_time < #{endDateTime} GROUP BY acl.user_id ), favorite_agg AS ( SELECT f.user_id, COUNT(*) AS favorite_count, MAX(f.create_time) AS last_active_time FROM favorite f WHERE f.create_time >= #{startDateTime} AND f.create_time < #{endDateTime} GROUP BY f.user_id ), active_user_ids AS ( SELECT user_id FROM login_agg UNION SELECT user_id FROM practice_agg UNION SELECT user_id FROM exam_agg UNION SELECT user_id FROM ai_agg UNION SELECT user_id FROM favorite_agg )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM active_user_ids au JOIN user u ON u.id = au.user_id AND u.deleted = 0
AND (u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname AS userNickname, u.phone AS userPhone, u.avatar AS userAvatar, GREATEST( COALESCE(login_agg.last_active_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00'), COALESCE(practice_agg.last_active_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00'), COALESCE(exam_agg.last_active_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00'), COALESCE(ai_agg.last_active_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00'), COALESCE(favorite_agg.last_active_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') ) AS lastActiveTime, COALESCE(login_agg.login_count, 0) AS loginCount, COALESCE(practice_agg.practice_record_count, 0) AS practiceRecordCount, COALESCE(practice_agg.practice_answer_count, 0) AS practiceAnswerCount, COALESCE(exam_agg.exam_record_count, 0) AS examRecordCount, COALESCE(exam_agg.exam_answer_count, 0) AS examAnswerCount, COALESCE(ai_agg.ai_call_count, 0) AS aiCallCount, COALESCE(favorite_agg.favorite_count, 0) AS favoriteCount, ( COALESCE(login_agg.login_count, 0) + COALESCE(practice_agg.practice_record_count, 0) + COALESCE(practice_agg.practice_answer_count, 0) + COALESCE(exam_agg.exam_record_count, 0) + COALESCE(exam_agg.exam_answer_count, 0) + COALESCE(ai_agg.ai_call_count, 0) + COALESCE(favorite_agg.favorite_count, 0) ) AS totalActionCount FROM active_user_ids au JOIN user u ON u.id = au.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN login_agg ON login_agg.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN practice_agg ON practice_agg.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN exam_agg ON exam_agg.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN ai_agg ON ai_agg.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN favorite_agg ON favorite_agg.user_id = au.user_id WHERE au.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
